description: Scans and reports on connected physical hardware and peripherals (USB, Audio, Camera).

params.cmd: system_profiler SPUSBDataType | grep -E 'Product ID|Vendor ID|Manufacturer' -B 2 | head -n 20
system_profiler SPCameraDataType | grep 'Model ID' -B 2 || echo 'No cameras detected'

params.instruction: Based on the raw system profiler data, provide a user-friendly summary of the connected peripherals. Identify if essential hardware for Kyberion (Microphone for voice, Camera for vision) is available.
